reference: I do marathons; my body is used to long distances. However, lately, for the last three weeks, after just two or three miles, the lower right portion of my back starts to hurt badly. I have to stop and stretch. This morning I completed four miles, and I can barely sit, stand, or walk right now. What is wrong?
text: I do marathons, my body is used to long distances, however, lately, for the last 3 weeks, after just 2 or 3 miles, the lower right portion of my back starts to hurt badly, I have to stop and stretch, this morning I completed 4 miles, and I can barely sit, stand, or walk right now, what is wrong?
